rulings.Case Title: D'ARCY & HARTY CONSTRUCTION, INC. ET AL VS. SALLY L. LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday April 26, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF D'ARCY & HARTY CONSTRUCTION, INC., JOHN BRITTON, EDWARD BERMAN Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief OFF CALENDAR per CCP 1005 and 1013. rulings.Case Title: SHENG-WEI LO ET AL VS. ROSALIA ELIAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday April 26, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT ROSALIA ELIAS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendants cite no authority for the proposition that the non-mandatory forms are controlling over the explicit requirements of the Government Code and SFRO. Defendants also cite no authority to support their argument that the certifications are improper. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HAWTHORNE/STONE REAL ESTATE INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. MARY SEGURA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion To Set Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday April 26, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT MARY SEGURA Notice Of Motion, Motion To Set Vacate Default And Judgment by no later than 9:00 a.m. on April 26, 2016 Defendant shall produce evidence referenced in her declaration at page 3 lines 2-3 ("receipts, bus tickets, etc."). Defendant shall be prepared to post $5,122.32 with the Court by the end of day on April 26, 2016. = (501/REQ)
